spec_match.rationale: The gallery continues to use sibling-index() and sibling-count() in CSS HSL and animation-delay formulas.

interactive.rationale: The saturation, lightness, add/remove, reset, and replay controls remain interactive.

blurb_alignment.rationale: The page still accurately explains live hue redistribution without JS color computation.

edge_cases.rationale: The JavaScript fallback remains available when sibling-index() is unsupported.

references.rationale: The page now includes the required ChromeStatus and CSS Values tree-counting links.

design_system.rationale: The support badge now uses project accent tokens instead of raw hex status colors.

summary: The hue ring gallery now carries the mandatory ChromeStatus reference and uses tokenized support badge colors while preserving its sibling-driven interactions.
